rationale: Educ. Code §28.010 governs school district parental notification about college credit and work-based education programs. It is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemptionamount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 28.010. NOTIFICATION REGARDING COLLEGE CREDIT AND WORK-BASED EDUCATION PROGRAMS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an unrelated subject area.
